rationale: Student picked Morgan & Morgan as the single base reference. Highest CTA visibility (sticky 'CALL NOW' header, persistent 'OPEN 24/7' badge) and highest visual coherence (black/white/bright-yellow brand palette used consistently). Section order: hero with video + 3-step 'how it works' -> stats/trust -> practice areas -> testimonials -> footer with repeated lead form.
notedDeviation: Morgan & Morgan's hero/footer form runs 5 fields (first/last name, phone, zip, email, case description), one over the universal 4-field floor. The niche template will cap the primary hero/footer form at 4 fields (name, phone, email, one-line case description) and route case-type/zip qualification to a second-step flow, per the CRO divergence note in 04-cro-patterns.md.
studentNotes: Serious, professional, trustworthy law-firm tone. Premium restrained motion (not energetic/trade-service feel). Light theme. Bold black/white/yellow brand-yellow accent reserved for CTAs and dollar figures only.
